message:
feat: Add -Dsource-dir option to build.zig for isolated builds

- build.zig now accepts -Dsource-dir to specify source directory
- edgeboxc build passes -Dsource-dir to zig build wasm-static
- Removes file copying from source zig-out/ to root zig-out/
- Each project's build artifacts stay in their own zig-out/ folder
